texto: ...My "poodle" brain craves the adventures that happen during training and racing. Days-long relays, obstacle courses involving fire and barbed wire, races at night, races where you wear tutus. (Fact: that can be every race, if you want it to be.) Some adventures can be intimidating, but it’s still fun to conquer something new.
explicacao: Citação de Dana L. Ayers sobre temas ligados a inteligencia. “...My "poodle" brain craves the adventures that happen during training and racing.
